title: BITS large transfer (bytesTransferred)
description: Detects BITS transfer > 2 GB
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=60 AND bytesTransferred > 2000000000

title: Exchange - Enable-TransportAgent with non-existent agent 'hack'
description: Detects attempt to enable non-existent transport agent named 'hack'
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=6 AND Message LIKE '%Enable-TransportAgent%' AND Message LIKE '%hack%'

title: Exchange - Install-TransportAgent with suspicious name 'Evil' and DLL
description: Detects installation of transport agent named 'Evil' with assembly path to a DLL
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=6 AND Message LIKE '%Install-TransportAgent%' AND Message LIKE '%Evil%' AND Message LIKE '%.dll%'

title: Exchange - Transport agent action by compromised user 'admmig'
description: Detects any transport agent enable/install attempt by user 'admmig'
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=6 AND Message LIKE '%admmig%' AND (Message LIKE '%TransportAgent%' OR Message LIKE '%Install-%' OR Message LIKE '%Enable-%')

title: Exchange - Attempt to load DLL from suspicious path (no drive letter)
description: Detects transport agent installation with assembly path using relative path or just DLL name
author: Security Team
falsepositives: Legitimate relative paths in some environments
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=6 AND Message LIKE '%Install-TransportAgent%' AND Message LIKE '%AssemblyPath%' AND Message NOT LIKE '%:\%'

title: Exchange - Transport agent installation error (generic)
description: Detects any failed transport agent installation with error message
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=6 AND Message LIKE '%Transport agent%' AND Message LIKE '%doesn''t exist%'

title: Proxy change to hacker-proxy.lan (field)
description: Detects proxy field set to hacker-proxy.lan
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=5600 AND pwszProxy LIKE '%hacker-proxy.lan%'

title: AutoConfig URL set to hacker-bypass.com
description: Detects autoconfig URL field
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=5600 AND pwszAutoConfigUrl LIKE '%hacker-bypass.com%'

title: DNS - EventLogLevel changed to 1 (minimal logging)
description: Detects DNS server event log level set to 1 (only errors)
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=541 AND Setting='EventLogLevel' AND NewValue='1'

title: DNS - EventLogLevel changed to 7
description: Detects DNS server event log level set to 7
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=541 AND Setting='EventLogLevel' AND NewValue='7'

title: DNS - DNSSEC disabled (EnableDnsSec=0)
description: Detects disabling of DNSSEC
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=541 AND Setting='EnableDnsSec' AND NewValue='0'

title: DNS - Any audit setting change
description: Detects any change to DNS server auditing settings
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=541 AND (Setting='EventLogLevel' OR Setting='EnableDnsSec')

title: OpenSSH - Failed password for valid user 'admmig'
description: Detects failed SSH password attempt for user admmig from 10.23.23.9
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=4 AND payload LIKE '%Failed password for admmig%' AND payload LIKE '%10.23.23.9%'

title: OpenSSH - Too many authentication failures
description: Detects disconnection due to too many authentication failures (brute-force detection)
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=4 AND payload LIKE '%Too many authentication failures%'

title: OpenSSH - Connection closed after failed auth
description: Detects connection closed after failed authentication attempt
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=4 AND payload LIKE '%Connection closed by authenticating user%'

title: OpenSSH - Any failed password from 10.23.23.9 (generic)
description: Detects any failed password attempt from known malicious IP
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=4 AND payload LIKE '%Failed password%' AND payload LIKE '%10.23.23.9%'

title: OpenSSH - Multiple failed attempts by same user (aggregate)
description: Detects 3+ failed password attempts for admmig within short time
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=4 AND payload LIKE '%Failed password for admmig%' GROUP BY payload HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3

title: OpenSSH - Invalid user 'hacker' from 10.23.23.9
description: Detects connection attempt with invalid username 'hacker' from malicious IP
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=4 AND payload LIKE '%Invalid user hacker%' AND payload LIKE '%10.23.23.9%'

title: OpenSSH - Failed password for invalid user 'hacker'
description: Detects failed password attempt for invalid user 'hacker'
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=4 AND payload LIKE '%Failed password for invalid user hacker%'

title: OpenSSH - Too many failures for invalid user
description: Detects disconnection due to too many authentication failures for an invalid user
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=4 AND payload LIKE '%Disconnecting invalid user%' AND payload LIKE '%Too many authentication failures%'

title: OpenSSH - Any invalid user attempt from 10.23.23.9
description: Detects any connection attempt with invalid user from malicious IP
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=4 AND payload LIKE '%Invalid user%' AND payload LIKE '%10.23.23.9%'

title: OpenSSH - Multiple invalid user attempts (aggregate)
description: Detects 3+ attempts with invalid user 'hacker'
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=4 AND payload LIKE '%Invalid user hacker%' GROUP BY payload HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3

title: PrintNightmare - Driver init failure (Param2 contains mimispool)
description: Detects EventID 354 where Param2 contains mimispool.dll
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=354 AND Param2 LIKE '%mimispool%'

title: PrintNightmare - Plugin load failed (PluginDllName contains mimispool)
description: Detects EventID 808 where PluginDllName contains mimispool.dll
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=808 AND PluginDllName LIKE '%mimispool%'

title: PrintNightmare - Default printer changed to Kiwi Legit Printer
description: Detects EventID 823 with NewDefaultPrinter pointing to malicious share
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=823 AND NewDefaultPrinter LIKE '%Kiwi Legit Printer%'

title: PrintNightmare - Any Param or Plugin field with mimispool
description: Searches across known fields for mimispool
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE (EventID=316 OR EventID=354 OR EventID=808) AND (Param2 LIKE '%mimispool%' OR PluginDllName LIKE '%mimispool%' OR Param1 LIKE '%mimispool%' OR Param4 LIKE '%mimispool%')

title: SQL Server - User linked to database with suspicious name 'test-sql'
description: Detects CREATE USER for 'test-sql' (likely test or backdoor account)
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%CREATE USER [test-sql]%'

title: SQL Server - User created by OFFSEC\admin (privileged account)
description: Detects user creation action performed by OFFSEC\admin (potentially compromised)
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%OFFSEC\\admin%' AND Message LIKE '%CREATE USER%'

title: SQL Server - User created in database RCS-TEST-db
description: Detects user creation in RCS-TEST-db database
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%database_name:RCS-TEST-db%' AND Message LIKE '%CREATE USER%'

title: SQL Server - Any user creation event (generic)
description: Detects any CREATE USER statement (may be noisy, but useful for auditing)
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%CREATE USER%'

title: SQL Server - User linked to login with same name (potential persistence)
description: Detects CREATE USER ... FOR LOGIN with same name (often used for backdoors)
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%CREATE USER [%] FOR LOGIN [%]%' AND Message REGEXP '\[test-sql\]'

title: SQL Server - User added to sysadmin role (critical privilege escalation)
description: Detects ALTER SERVER ROLE ... ADD MEMBER to sysadmin
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%ALTER SERVER ROLE [sysadmin] ADD MEMBER%'

title: SQL Server - Member added to server role by compromised user 'admmig'
description: Detects server role modification performed by OFFSEC\admmig
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%OFFSEC\\admmig%' AND Message LIKE '%ADD MEMBER%'

title: SQL Server - Addition of 'test-sql' to any server role
description: Detects when user 'test-sql' is added to a server role (indicator of backdoor)
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%ADD MEMBER [test-sql]%'

title: SQL Server - Any alteration of server role membership
description: Detects any ALTER SERVER ROLE ... ADD/DROP MEMBER statement
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%ALTER SERVER ROLE%' AND Message LIKE '%ADD MEMBER%'

title: SQL Server - User added to db_accessadmin role (privilege escalation)
description: Detects ALTER ROLE [db_accessadmin] ADD MEMBER
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%ALTER ROLE [db_accessadmin] ADD MEMBER%'

title: SQL Server - Database role modification by compromised user 'admmig'
description: Detects ALTER ROLE performed by OFFSEC\admmig
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%OFFSEC\\admmig%' AND Message LIKE '%ALTER ROLE%'

title: SQL Server - Addition of 'test-sql' to a database role (backdoor indicator)
description: Detects ADD MEMBER [test-sql] to any database role
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%ADD MEMBER [test-sql]%'

title: SQL Server - Role change in database RCS-TEST-db
description: Detects ALTER ROLE in RCS-TEST-db
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%database_name:RCS-TEST-db%' AND Message LIKE '%ALTER ROLE%'

title: SQL Server - Any database role membership change (generic)
description: Detects any ALTER ROLE ADD/DROP MEMBER statement
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%ALTER ROLE%' AND Message LIKE '%ADD MEMBER%'

title: SQL Server - Local user created with weak password policy (CHECK_EXPIRATION=OFF, CHECK_POLICY=OFF)
description: Detects CREATE LOGIN with disabled password expiration and policy (backdoor account)
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%CREATE LOGIN%' AND Message LIKE '%CHECK_EXPIRATION=OFF%' AND Message LIKE '%CHECK_POLICY=OFF%'

title: SQL Server - Suspicious login name 'test-sql' created
description: Detects creation of login with name 'test-sql' (likely test or backdoor)
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%CREATE LOGIN [test-sql]%'

title: SQL Server - Login created by OFFSEC\admin (privileged account)
description: Detects login creation performed by OFFSEC\admin
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%OFFSEC\\admin%' AND Message LIKE '%CREATE LOGIN%'

title: SQL Server - Login created with default database 'master'
description: Detects CREATE LOGIN with DEFAULT_DATABASE=[master] (often used for persistence)
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%CREATE LOGIN%' AND Message LIKE '%DEFAULT_DATABASE=[master]%'

title: SQL Server - Any CREATE LOGIN event (generic)
description: Detects any creation of SQL Server login
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%CREATE LOGIN%'

title: SQL Server - Failed login for non-existing user 'b'
description: Detects failed login attempt for non-existing user 'b'
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%Login failed for user %b%' AND Message LIKE '%Could not find a login%'

title: SQL Server - Failed login for non-existing user 'administrator'
description: Detects failed login attempt for non-existing 'administrator'
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%Login failed for user %administrator%' AND Message LIKE '%Could not find a login%'

title: SQL Server - SQL authentication attempt when Windows auth only
description: Detects SQL auth attempt on server configured for Windows authentication only
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%Server is configured for Windows authentication only%'

title: SQL Server - Any failed login with non-existing user (generic)
description: Detects any login failure due to missing login
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%Could not find a login%'

title: SQL Server - Failed login for disabled SA account from 10.23.23.9
description: Detects failed login attempt for 'sa' from IP 10.23.23.9
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%Login failed for user %sa%' AND Message LIKE '%CLIENT: 10.23.23.9%'

title: SQL Server - Failed SA login with password evaluation error
description: Detects 'An error occurred while evaluating the password' for SA account
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%Login failed for user %sa%' AND Message LIKE '%error occurred while evaluating the password%'

title: SQL Server - Any failed login for SA account (generic)
description: Detects any failed login for 'sa' regardless of IP or reason
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE EventID=33205 AND Message LIKE '%Login failed for user %sa%'

title: CredGuard - HypervisorPlatform disabled via UpdateName
description: Detects UpdateName='HypervisorPlatform' with PackageIdentifier containing 'Disabled'
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE (EventID=9 OR EventID=10) AND UpdateName='HypervisorPlatform' AND PackageIdentifier LIKE '%Disabled%'

title: CredGuard - VirtualMachinePlatform disabled
description: Detects UpdateName='VirtualMachinePlatform' with Disabled
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE (EventID=7 OR EventID=8) AND UpdateName='VirtualMachinePlatform' AND PackageIdentifier LIKE '%Disabled%'

title: CredGuard - WSL disabled (Microsoft-Windows-Subsystem-Linux)
description: Detects UpdateName='Microsoft-Windows-Subsystem-Linux'
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE (EventID=7 OR EventID=8) AND UpdateName='Microsoft-Windows-Subsystem-Linux'

title: CredGuard - Defender definitions change
description: Detects UpdateName='Windows-Defender-Default-Definitions'
author: Security Team
rule: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE (EventID=8 OR EventID=10) AND UpdateName='Windows-Defender-Default-Definitions'
